inputs.decision: D6=B (expand sketch to all native tiers)

summary: Round 1: --style clean|sketch axis for FLOWCHART — deterministic rough generator (src/rough), bundled OFL Kalam font (base64 @font-face + resvg-registered), sketch shapes/edges/open-arrowheads in static SVG + a byte-identical inlined mirror in vnmRuntime (dom-runtime-parity extended to sketch). Round 2 (D6=B): extended sketch to the NATIVE tiers (sequence/class/state) via a shared src/render/sketch-svg.ts helper; class keeps UML head markers, state pseudo-state dots stay clean; class/state interactive+HTML reuse the flowchart runtime, sequence embeds the sketch SVG in the seqRuntime shell; threaded style through route.ts/cli/html/png (+ font registration). Only the mermaid fallback tier keeps its look (CLI note). Bumped 0.5.0; 333 tests green.
